headline: PSEG Long Island Grid Upgrades Support Reliability And Investor Valuation Outlook
summary: PSEG Long Island, part of Public Service Enterprise Group (NYSE:PEG), has completed storm-hardening upgrades on more than 1,400 miles of power distribution circuits. These upgrades are aimed at strengthening grid reliability and reducing outage damage during the 2026 hurricane season and future extreme weather events. The work positions PSEG Long Island as a leader in electric service resilience at a time when regulators and customers are closely watching infrastructure performance. For...

headline: A Look At Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) Valuation As Grid Investment Plans Draw Attention
summary: Why Public Service Enterprise Group is on investors’ radar today Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) is drawing fresh attention after its recent share performance, with the stock last closing at $78.59 and mixed returns over the past year across different timeframes. See our latest analysis for Public Service Enterprise Group. headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) $500 Million 4.800% Senior Notes Offering
summary: In early June 2026, Public Service Enterprise Group completed a US$500 million public offering of 4.800% senior unsecured fixed-rate notes due June 15, 2031, issued at a slight discount and callable by the company. By pairing this long-term funding with ongoing grid hardening and reliability upgrades, PSEG is underscoring its commitment to resilient energy infrastructure and disciplined balance sheet management. We’ll now explore how PSEG’s new US$500 million senior notes issue could...
